PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Mar-01-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: John DiAna, via ZOOM, for Gregory Christian, Petitioner.

The court and counsel discuss the distributions set forth within the will specifically, regarding the gift to 55 Laguna Open House. After additional discussion, the court confirms and advises counsel that 55 Laguna is commonly known as Open House and that counsel should attempt to make distributions of tangible property to the residents of Open House.

This matter was set for hearing with no appearance required for the purpose of admitting the will. No one appeared to object. There being no objections, the Court granted the Petition for Probate of Will and for Letters Testamentary. The will dated Jul-04-2021is admitted to probate. Gregory Brian Christian is appointed Executor of the estate with full authority. Bond is set at $175,000. Karen Ann Simons is appointed probate referee. Order for the same signed in open Court. Status on close of estate is set for Apr-18-2023 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204. If a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is filed by Apr-11-2023, the status hearing will be taken off calendar.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: R. Cristobal. Not reported.
